title: Playground-derived event catalog (normalized + classified)
source_of_truth: telemetry/.plan/braze-sdk-playground.html (SDK_EVENT_NAMES + TELEMETRY_EVENT_NAMES + user_profile_patch from playground JS)
machine_readable_contract: Seed for Catalog + alias rows; SystemCatalogConfig references canonical_name.

rules: snake_case and dotted Magento hooks: normalize separators to _, split segments, PascalCase each, join.
StudlyCaps tokens without underscores preserved (AddToCart, PageView).
purchase + Purchase -> Purchase; add_to_cart + AddToCart -> AddToCart.
page_viewed -> PageView (single canonical for page-view signals in this catalog).
normalization.ingest_resolution: Resolve incoming event.name to canonical_name (case-insensitive + alias map) before SystemCatalogConfig evaluation.

domain_tags.ux_experience: Session, navigation, UI engagement, product discovery.
domain_tags.business_system: Magento/Go hooks, plugins, sync pipelines — server-side.
domain_tags.clinical_intake_care: Intake flows, appointments, labs, clinical uploads.
domain_tags.commerce_monetization: Cart, checkout, orders, payments, credits, subscriptions.
domain_tags.identity_account: Auth, registration, password, portal identity, profile/address traits.
domain_tags.growth_marketing: Referrals, leads, messaging, upsell panels, applications.
domain_tags.placeholder_meta: Non-production placeholder — block or quarantine in strict mode.
domain_tags.requires_manual_domain_review: Heuristic did not confidently tag; human review in backoffice.

braze_primary_surface.custom_event_domain: Domain-specific name; REST events[] / Web logCustomEvent.
braze_primary_surface.custom_event_meta_standard_name: Marketing-standard label; same transport as custom event.
braze_primary_surface.purchase_revenue_signal: Commerce outcome; mapper may populate purchases[] and/or revenue fields.
braze_primary_surface.user_attributes_patch: Profile/traits; REST attributes[] primary; optional companion event.

ga4_measurement_protocol_shape_hint.purchase_or_ecommerce: Use GA4 purchase / ecommerce params where applicable.
ga4_measurement_protocol_shape_hint.recommended_or_custom_event: May map to GA4 recommended events when params align; else custom.
ga4_measurement_protocol_shape_hint.user_properties_or_custom: User properties updates vs event stream; versioned mapper decides.

special_entries.UserProfilePatch: From fireTelemetryProfile(); not in TELEMETRY_EVENT_NAMES array.
special_entries.EventName: Alias event_name — placeholder; exclude from prod or replace.

braze.notes: In Braze, most names are custom events via REST events[] or Web SDK logCustomEvent. Revenue may additionally use purchases[]. User traits use attributes[].

ga4.notes: GA4 uses client_id/user_id + events[] with name + params; user properties are a separate surface. Map from universal envelope via versioned mappers.
